# Architecture Diagrams

## System Overview

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Autoloads
        S["Simulation<br/>(scripts/simulation.gd)"]
        CF["ContextField<br/>(scripts/context_field.gd)"]
        SD["SemanticDictionary<br/>(scripts/semantic_dictionary.gd)"]
    end

    subgraph Models
        WN["WordNode<br/>(scripts/word_node.gd)"]
        MC["MeaningCloud<br/>(scripts/meaning_cloud.gd)"]
    end

    subgraph Data
        JSON["meanings_ru.json<br/>(data/meanings_ru.json)"]
    end

    subgraph Scenes
        MAIN["Main.tscn"]
        WNS["WordNode.tscn"]
        MCS["MeaningCloud.tscn"]
        UI["UI.tscn"]
    end

    subgraph Assets
        SHADER["cloud_shader<br/>(assets/shaders/cloud_shader.gdshader)"]
    end

    MAIN --> S
    MAIN --> CF
    MAIN --> SD
    S --> WN
    S --> MC
    SD --> JSON
    MC --> SHADER
    WN --> WNS
    MC --> MCS
```

## Simulation Step (per frame)

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    START([_process frame]) --> CF_U[ContextField.update]
    CF_U --> SIM_S[Simulation.step]
    SIM_S --> WORD_LOOP{"words left?"}
    WORD_LOOP -->|yes| CLOUD_LOOP{"clouds left?"}
    CLOUD_LOOP -->|yes| GET_FORCE[ContextField.force_for_cloud]
    GET_FORCE --> APPLY[MeaningCloud.apply_force]
    APPLY --> WEIGHT[update weight & entropy]
    WEIGHT --> CLOUD_LOOP
    CLOUD_LOOP -->|no| DOM[detect dominant meaning]
    DOM --> PRECIP[detect precipitation]
    PRECIP --> WORD_LOOP
    WORD_LOOP -->|no| RENDER[Simulation.render]
    RENDER --> DONE([end frame])
```

## Dominant Meaning Detection

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    W["WordNode"] --> C["MeaningCloud[]"]
    C --> SCORE["score = weight × (1 − entropy)"]
    SCORE --> MAX["max score"]
    MAX --> D["dominant_cloud"]
    D --> CHECK{"weight > 0.85<br/>&<br/>entropy < 0.2?"}
    CHECK -->|no| DONE["no precipitation"]
    CHECK -->|yes| PRECIP["Precipitation!
    Word → 'label'
    (weight=0.87 entropy=0.15)"]
```

## Context Wind Effect

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    CTX["ContextField
    direction: Vector2.RIGHT
    strength: 0.7
    bias_keywords: ['музыка','ноты']"]
    CTX --> CHECK2{"cloud.label
    contains bias_keyword?"}
    CHECK2 -->|"yes (музыка)"| FULL["full force
    direction × strength"]
    CHECK2 -->|"no (шифр)"| REDUCED["reduced force
    direction × strength × 0.1"]
    FULL --> GAIN["weight += 0.007
    entropy -= 0.0035"]
    REDUCED --> LOSS["weight ×= 0.995
    entropy += 0.001"]
```
